monotonicity.criterion: pass iff quality_q level means are strictly decreasing and the fitted slope 95% CI is below zero

applicability_boundary.claim_scope: Empirical monotonicity is claimed only for the generated Gaussian-OU toy world, the deterministic runner constants, and the listed debt grid.
applicability_boundary.debt_injection_model: deterministic finite-sample-support debt injection through dose-indexed source sample counts, classifier certification status, and stability scope
